name: Minus Pico
description:
"A lizard that is trying to be what he believes he is: a dinosaur. Sure, he might look like such a threat, but pfft, do you see this guy as a danger? I mean, look at him! Who would wear pajamas 24/7? But hey, let's not ruin it for him, mhm? Yeah, I think we should do that."

(ART WAS FOUND ON @ChonkyPico'S TWITTER/X PAGE!)

Requested by @Sleepy_Mushrxxm GG YOU'RE GETTING HIM!!! I ALSO HAD TO FIND THE ART WITH TONGUE BITE LOL

My second Pico bot LMAO! I'm sure I'll enjoy him a lot, especially with his.. 2x multiplier, if you know what I mean. Ahem! ENJOY HIM!!!

TW: Possible cannibalism, and uh.. violence, idk rll I'm bad at noticing possible trigger warnings.. ;-;

If you didn't know yet, the reason why the bot sometimes does stuff as your character is unknown, since it's something about the platform itself and not the character and it's definition. I can't help that, sadly. Like, who doesn't care about this!? This is so fucking obnoxious! Anyways, that's all, have fun or whatever.
creator: 𝓜𝓪𝓻𝔂𝓵𝓲𝓷 "𝓜𝓸𝓶𝓶𝔂" 𝓜𝓮𝓪𝓻𝓮𝓼𝓽
